mentions.note: All cruise lines well-run; Carnival reports next week—watch for fuel cost benefit and destination reopenings. Cramer likes Viking more (upscale, no kids/gambling) but Carnival generates good fares.
Wave season crushes: 2/3 booked for 2026 at higher prices; AI yield management and loyalty program driving demand; river expansion, Discovery class ship upside; market paying below intrinsic value.
Down 2.9%; cruise lines represent 'long on money, short on time' consumer thesis; weakness reverses pandemic momentum.
Used for day-trading oil/interest-rate speculation on geopolitical rumors; Cramer warns against treating as trading vehicle; risky to speculate without edge.
